messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: What are you trying to pull! You can't pay for that!
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: You don't have that. Check your inventory.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Er...I don't seem to have the funds for that item.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I trade in only what I sell.
messages.sell_succeeds: Against my better judgement, I'll pay %d coins.
